instruction: <RETAIL>You are Sofia Li, residing in San Antonio, 78260. The digital camera you received doesn't zoom as far as you expected. You use the camera for bird-watching and want to exchange it for a camera that has the maximum zoom capacity. Price is not an issue, but ensure all the other specifications of the camera to be exchanged are the same, except for the zoom capacity which has to be maximized. You want the exchange to be completed as soon as possible. You want to use your PayPal account for any additional payment.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: exchange it for a camera that has the maximum zoom capacity
dialogue_state.initial_query: exchange digital camera for one with maximum zoom

hints.segment: all the other specifications of the camera to be exchanged are the same
hints.hint: All other features should match the original camera

hints.segment: the digital camera you received doesn't zoom as far as you expected
hints.hint: The camera I received doesn't zoom as far as I expected

hints.segment: exchange to be completed as soon as possible
hints.hint: Please complete the exchange as quickly as possible

hints.segment: use your PayPal account for any additional payment
hints.hint: Use my PayPal account for any extra payment
I use the camera mainly for bird-watching
